data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Last-touch/first-touch policy fields', which are necessary for the linked use case. However, the prior step evidence does not include any information or records related to these policy fields, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical data means the requirement is not met, leading to a failed validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add last-touch/first-touch policy fields
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that last-touch/first-touch policy fields are correctly implemented and accessible.
